scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "@workspace/api-server" --filter "@workspace/spades-game" --if-present run build
scripts.build:render-staging: corepack pnpm run typecheck:render-staging && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && env PORT=21046 BASE_PATH=/ corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/spades-game run build
scripts.typecheck:render-staging: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/db exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit false && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/spades-game run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
